a260722p1.summary: South Korean giant could invest as much as €1bn in French AI group seeking to be a leading alternative to US tech
a260722p1.title: Sources: Samsung may invest up to €1B in Mistral as part of a broader round valuing it at ~€20B, after previously backing the AI startup through its venture arm (Financial Times)

a260722p14.summary: We're reporting live from the company's event in London, UK. — It's time for Samsung to properly unveil its latest lineup of foldables and smartwatches at its Unpacked event today.
a260722p14.title: A live blog of Samsung's Galaxy Unpacked in London, where the company is set to unveil its latest lineup of foldables and smartwatches (Engadget)

a260722p15.summary: The “Ultra” moniker is alive and well, but it now applies to the Galaxy Z Fold series.
a260722p15.title: Samsung unveils the $2,100+ Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra, featuring its "most advanced foldable design", a Flex Titanium display, a 5,000mAH battery, and Android 17 (Andrew Romero/9to5Google)

a260722p16.summary: Samsung has officially unveiled its new Galaxy Z Fold 8, which goes beyond a generation refresh, delivering a completely …
a260722p16.title: Samsung unveils the $1,900+ Galaxy Z Fold 8 with a wider, 7.6" inner and a short, 5.5" outer display, a Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 "for Galaxy" chip, and more (Ben Schoon/9to5Google)

a260722p17.summary: It's a year of refinement for the Galaxy Watch. With the new Galaxy Watch 9 and Galaxy Watch Ultra 2, which are being announced today …
a260722p17.title: Samsung unveils the Galaxy Watch 9 and Watch Ultra 2, moving from its Exynos chips to the Snapdragon Wear Elite and hiking prices by $30 to $380 and $50 to $700 (Victoria Song/The Verge)

a260722p18.summary: The design and most specs are unchanged from the previous model. — As part of its Galaxy Unpacked 2026 event …
a260722p18.title: Samsung debuts the $1,200+ Galaxy Z Flip 8 with a lighter, smaller, and slimmer design, and new Flex Window features for apps and insights on the cover screen (Steve Dent/Engadget)

a260722p19.summary: It's happening. Samsung has officially adopted silicon-carbon batteries on its latest foldables, though you wouldn't know that by looking …
a260722p19.title: Samsung says the Galaxy Z Fold 8, Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra, and Galaxy Z Flip 8 have silicon-carbon batteries, citing their performance, longevity, and safety (Ben Schoon/9to5Google)

a260722p2.summary: The rapidly increasing global competitiveness of China's artificial intelligence models is ringing alarm bells in Washington …
a260722p2.title: Chinese AI models account for ~60% of token usage by US companies on OpenRouter, making restrictions harder to impose without disrupting US users and businesses (Nectar Gan/Bloomberg)

a260722p20.summary: The AI giant has committed $20 billion to a new data-center project in Georgia and hired an architect of Elon Musk's computing build-out
a260722p20.title: Source: OpenAI raised its projected cloud spending to ~$750B through 2030, up from a projection of ~$600B earlier this year, reflecting new cloud agreements (Anissa Gardizy/Wall Street Journal)

a260722p21.summary: OpenAI plans to spend tens of billions of dollars on a massive new data center near Savannah, Georgia as part of the ChatGPT maker's push …
a260722p21.title: OpenAI plans to spend $30B+ on a massive new data center in Georgia, securing 3.2GW of total energy; several hundred MW are set to come online starting in 2028 (Dina Bass/Bloomberg)

a260722p22.summary: There are a number of reasons why Samsung dominates Wear OS, and the Galaxy Watch 9 and Ultra 2 exemplify that once again this year - here's what you need to know.
a260722p22.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 and Ultra 2 hands-on: nice improvements with a rugged look and new AI-powered fitness features, but a blockier shape is not for everyone (Damien Wilde/9to5Google)

a260722p23.summary: 📱 Samsung has announced the Galaxy Z Flip 8 — 📐 It comes with a slightly tweaked design and better performance
a260722p23.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8 hands-on: like the Z Flip 7, including the battery and cameras, but with much faster performance, four colors, and a $100 higher price (Max Buondonno/The Shortcut)

a260722p24.summary: While we wait for Apple's rumored foldable iPhone, Samsung is polishing a design it already has on the market.
a260722p24.title: Samsung Z Fold 8 Ultra hands-on: its new Flex Titanium tech makes the crease practically nonexistent and the specs match the S26 Ultra's, but it costs $100 more (David Imel/The Verge)

a260722p25.summary: WhatsApp is rolling out a suite of new features, including a revamped Apple CarPlay and Android Auto experience as part …
a260722p25.title: WhatsApp updates its CarPlay and Android Auto integrations to include message playback, replies and more, now lets users sign up from its iPad app, and more (Aisha Malik/TechCrunch)

a260722p26.summary: Samsung Electronics Co. showcased the smart glasses it developed in partnership with Alphabet Inc.'s Google …
a260722p26.title: Samsung teases its smart glasses, developed with Google, Warby Parker, and Gentle Monster, and says they will have a nine-hour battery life and privacy features (Chris Welch/Bloomberg)

a260722p27.summary: A year after overhauling its Z Fold phone with a radically thinner design, Samsung has changed things up again, this time altering the shape entirely.
a260722p27.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 hands-on: the passport-esque shape feels great and is almost immediately intuitive, but no telephoto lens, IP48, and $1,900+ is pricey (Dominic Preston/The Verge)

a260722p28.summary: Arrakis, a seven-month old London- and Paris-based startup building what it calls an AI “operating system” for industrial companies …
a260722p28.title: London-based Arrakis, which makes AI agents for industrial companies, emerges from stealth with a $7.5M seed and a $30M Series A at a $140M post-money valuation (Jeremy Kahn/Fortune)

a260722p29.summary: Apple Inc. is readying an overhaul of its Mac line, seeking to capitalize on demand for powerful laptops and desktops fueled by the artificial intelligence boom.
a260722p29.title: Sources: Apple is set to debut new versions of every Mac, including long-awaited iMac updates, a revamped MacBook Pro, and a new Neo, across the fall and 2027 (Mark Gurman/Bloomberg)

a260722p3.summary: Pressure from President Donald Trump to manufacture advanced semiconductors in the U.S. is increasing costs and squeezing margins at TSMC, the world's leading chipmaker.
a260722p3.title: TSMC forecasts "several years" of margin dilution as overseas fab projects ramp up; the company has announced $200B in investment into US manufacturing (Kai Nicol-Schwarz/CNBC)

a260722p30.summary: Enterprise software firm Monday.com said Wednesday it plans to cut 20% of its workforce in the second half of ths year to …
a260722p30.title: Filing: Monday.com plans to cut 20% of its workforce, or ~600 employees, in H2 2026 to "support a leaner, more focused operational model" as it invests in AI (Martin Peers/The Information)

a260722p31.summary: Conker, Crimson Skies, Fuzion Frenzy, and Blinx head to Xbox PC for the first time, complete with Xbox achievements, and more are on the way.
a260722p31.title: Xbox expands its backward compatibility program to PC, starting with four classic original Xbox games, offering 4X resolution scaling, V-Sync support, and more (Jez Corden/Windows Central)

a260722p32.summary: We have information that Moonshot AI distilled Anthropic's Fable for the development of its K3 model. To do this they developed a sophisticated internal platform to conduct large scale distillation against U.S. models, allowing them to quickly switch between multiple methods of
a260722p32.title: White House OSTP Director Michael Kratsios says "we have information that Moonshot AI distilled Anthropic's Fable for the development of its K3 model" (Director Michael Kratsios/@mkratsios47)

a260722p33.summary: OpenAI is launching a new product that could help the company take another step beyond the ultra-competitive business of making AI models.
a260722p33.title: OpenAI introduces OpenAI Presence to help companies better connect AI agents to their internal systems and automate customer support, sales, and other tasks (Business Insider)

a260722p34.summary: Meta Platforms Inc. tapped a veteran cybersecurity executive to serve as its next chief information security officer …
a260722p34.title: Meta names Assaf Keren, a former chief security officer at Qualtrics and a former CISO at PayPal, as its next CISO, succeeding Guy Rosen, who will leave in 2026 (Riley Griffin/Bloomberg)

a260722p35.summary: A White House official accused China's Moonshot of improperly using US AI models and Nvidia Corp. chips to create …
a260722p35.title: White House OSTP Director Michael Kratsios says Moonshot AI "acquired GB300-equipped servers and has accessed GB300s in Thailand, likely to train its AI models" (Maggie Eastland/Bloomberg)

a260722p36.summary: Last December, Google sued SerpApi over scraping its search results, and now a court has granted SerpApi's motion to dismiss the case.
a260722p36.title: A US judge dismisses Google's lawsuit against web scraping service SerpApi, saying plain and aggregated search results are not protected under copyright law (Barry Schwartz/Search Engine Roundtable)

a260722p37.summary: Arcee, an American open-weigh AI provider, announced a partnership with the Department of Energy, in which the DOE will use Arcee's AI models to advance scientific research.
a260722p37.title: Arcee, which develops open-weight models in the US, partners with the Department of Energy to build Genesis-Science-1, an open model for scientific research (Catherine Perloff/The Information)

a260722p38.summary: Cashea, Venezuela's largest financial technology company, has raised $100 million across two financing rounds, as global investors bet …
a260722p38.title: Cashea, Venezuela's largest fintech startup that offers a banking and payments app, raised a $40M Series A, including $20M in debt, and a $60M Series B (Maria Clara Cobo/Bloomberg)

a260722p39.summary: There's a new female-founded unicorn. GlossGenius, which started as a salon management platform, just raised $44 million …
a260722p39.title: Genius AI, formerly GlossGenius, which pivoted from a salon management platform to offer AI tools for service SMBs, raised a $44M Series D at a $1.15B valuation (Emma Hinchliffe/Fortune)

a260722p4.summary: In early February, Caden Booth, a 21-year-old TikToker, flew from Cincinnati to San Francisco and headed for the stadium where Super Bowl LX was taking place.
a260722p4.title: Dune: since January 2021, wallets funded via US-regulated exchanges accounted for ~50% of all traceable trading volume on Polymarket's US-banned global platform (Bloomberg)

a260722p40.summary: A team of former DOGE employees have raised a major funding round for a startup that aims to use AI to expand U.S. military cyber capabilities …
a260722p40.title: Sources: Cathedral, launched by ex-DOGE staffers to use AI to expand US military cyber capabilities, raised $160M led by a16z and Sequoia at a $1.4B valuation (David Jeans/Reuters)

a260722p41.summary: As social media has evolved from a place to connect with friends into large-scale entertainment platforms …
a260722p41.title: Yope, a social network that has ~15M registered users for its "micro communities" and no algorithms, ads, or public content, raised $12.3M seed led by Northzone (Sarah Perez/TechCrunch)

a260722p42.summary: For Meta, the move was a reprieve after it and YouTube were found guilty in another case in March of negligence and personal injury for their platforms' addictive features.
a260722p42.title: A Florida teenager drops his lawsuit accusing Meta of creating harmful social media features, following settlements with co-defendants TikTok, Snap, and YouTube (New York Times)

a260722p43.summary: Travis Kalanick's robotics company, Atoms, has raised $1.7 billion in a funding round led by Andreessen Horowitz.
a260722p43.title: Travis Kalanick's robotics startup Atoms raised $1.7B led by a16z, with Uber and others participating; Ben Horowitz will join the startup's board (Sean O'Kane/TechCrunch)

a260722p49.summary: IBM on Wednesday lowered its 2026 forecast and delivered thinner quarterly profits than analysts had projected …
a260722p49.title: IBM reports Q2 revenue up 1% YoY to $17.2B, vs. $17.6B est., infrastructure revenue down 7% to $3.8B, Z mainframe revenue down 42%, and lowers its 2026 forecast (Jordan Novet/CNBC)

a260722p50.summary: Follow topics and authors from this story to see more like this in your personalized homepage feed and to receive email updates.
a260722p50.title: Google says Gemini now has 950M MAUs, up from 900M in May and 750M in February (Emma Roth/The Verge)

a260722p51.summary: The US Securities and Exchange Commission agreed to pay $150,000 in legal fees to end Coinbase Global Inc.'s 2024 lawsuit seeking …
a260722p51.title: The SEC agrees to pay $150,000 in legal fees to end Coinbase's 2024 lawsuit seeking internal docs on the regulator's Biden-era crackdown on the crypto industry (Nicola M White/Bloomberg)

a260722p52.summary: ServiceNow Inc. reported better-than-expected quarterly sales and bookings, boosting Wall Street's hopes that the software maker's …
a260722p52.title: ServiceNow reports Q2 subscription revenue up 24.5% YoY to $3.88B, increases full year subscription revenue growth estimate to 23%; NOW jumps 4%+ after hours (Brody Ford/Bloomberg)

a260722p53.summary: Alphabet Inc. said its cloud computing unit had a $514 billion backlog of contracted work that hasn't been recorded as revenue yet …
a260722p53.title: Google says its cloud computing unit had a $514B backlog of contracted work that hasn't been recorded as revenue yet, up from ~$460B held during Q1 (Julia Love/Bloomberg)

a260722p54.summary: Alphabet Inc. projected full-year capital expenditures will be $195 billion to $205 billion in 2026, increasing …
a260722p54.title: Google projects full-year capex will be $195B to $205B in 2026, after saying in April that it will spend as much as $190B; its Q2 capex hit $44.92B, up 100% YoY (Julia Love/Bloomberg)

a260722p55.summary: Movement Labs, the developer behind the Movement blockchain, has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy, marking the latest setback …
a260722p55.title: Movement Labs, a layer-2 Ethereum blockchain developer, files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy after a period of upheaval that included a token scandal and Binance ban (CoinDesk)

a260722p56.summary: Almost 200 Silicon Valley companies, including Proton and Y-Combinator, are urging the Trump administration not to cut off access …
a260722p56.title: The Little Tech Association, a new group of ~200 companies across the startup community, including Y Combinator, urges Trump not to ban Chinese open-weight AI (Sophia Cai/Politico)

a260722p57.summary: Increasing use of aggressive training techniques sharpens threat of bad behaviour by leading models
a260722p57.title: Sources: OpenAI staff were "freaked out" when GPT-Sol 5.6 breached Hugging Face, as OpenAI used more aggressive training methods to compete with Anthropic (Financial Times)

a260722p58.summary: Search giant says it will commit up to $205bn to AI investments in 2026 — Google burned through cash in the second quarter for the first time since …
a260722p58.title: Google reports Q2 free cash flow at negative $5.9B amid increased AI spending, marking its first cash burn since going public decades ago (Ryan McMorrow/Financial Times)

a260722p59.summary: Tesla (TSLA.O) on Wednesday missed analysts' profit forecasts for the second quarter and, for the first time in more than two years …
a260722p59.title: Tesla reports a negative Q2 free cash flow of $1.1B, its first in over two years, partly due to increased AI and robotic investments, amid diminishing profits (Reuters)

a260722p60.summary: Meta Infrastructure has become bloated, with middle managers expending resources on over-engineered technology solutions that lose sight of broader organizational needs.
a260722p60.title: Meta's infrastructure teams have become bloated, leading to poor decisions like troubled Rivos acquisition, loss of supplier trust due to hardware pivots, more (SemiAnalysis)

a260722p61.summary: Amazon workers on federal aid nearly tripled between 2020 and 2025, while ride-hailing and food delivery app drivers shot …
a260722p61.title: US GAO study: Amazon workers on federal aid tripled from February 2020 to September 2025; ride-hailing and delivery apps topped employers with workers on aid (Washington Post)

a260722p62.summary: Prediction markets are an increasingly popular way for people to trade on the outcomes of real-world events.
a260722p62.title: A study of 11,989 Polymarket users finds 61% placed fewer than 100 trades over a six-week period, with 58% making or losing less than $100 during that period (Kaitlyn Radde/Pew Research Center)

a260722p63.summary: It was billed as cryptocurrency's big moment, President Donald Trump's first legislative victory in his drive to make the US the “crypto capital of the world.”
a260722p63.title: Sources detail how Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick and crypto adviser Bo Hines worked to shape the GENIUS Act and loosen safeguards to benefit Tether (Bloomberg)
